nasb.text: and the priest shall look at him, and behold, if the infection has turned to white, then the priest shall pronounce clean him who has the infection; he is clean.

esv.text: and the priest shall examine him, and if the disease has turned white, then the priest shall pronounce the diseased person clean; he is clean.

cnv.text: 祭司要察看；如果看見患處變白了，祭司就要宣布那患病者為潔淨的；他就潔淨了。

ccb.text: 祭司检查时，若发现溃烂之处确已变白，就要宣布他是洁净的，他便洁净了。
